title: Automatic group count for each board
excerpt: I’d like to be able to know how many groups I have on each individual board. For example, if each group represents a project I’m working on within a topic (which is the board), I’d like to know how many projects I’m work…

posts.author: Leah54 (Leah S)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to be able to know how many groups I have on each individual board. For example, if each group represents a project I’m working on within a topic (which is the board), I’d like to know how many projects I’m working on in total under that area. Thanks!
